name: Apple Cinnamon Cranberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Light or Dark Corn Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crusts for a two-crust pie using a 9-inch pan. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a large bowl, stir together sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon until well mixed.
3. In another large bowl, mix apples, cranberries, and corn syrup. Add the fruit to the sugar mixture. Mix to combine.
4. Spoon the filling into the pie crust-lined pan. Dot with butter.
5. Top with the second crust; flute the edges. Make four 4-inch slashes in the center of the crust, forming a criss-cross design.
6. Fold back the center points and press lightly to form 8 petals. Brush the crust with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
7. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce the temperature to 350°F and continue baking for 40 to 45 minutes, or until golden brown. Allow to cool completely on a wire rack before serving. Store in the refrigerator.
